KO EN JA

Iheon Kim

This site is a personal archive for theoretical physics notes, lectures, seminar material, and writing on subculture.

AFFILIATION
POSTECH, Department of Physics
POSITION
PhD Student
PhD ADVISOR
Professor Hee-Cheol Kim
RESEARCH
Gauge theory / quantum field theory / lattice models / neutral-atom simulation / automorphic forms
ACADEMIC INTERESTS
SUSY / string theory
PERSONAL INTERESTS
Anime / games / music / subculture criticism
CV
PDF (in preparation)
CONTACT
2heon2@postech.ac.kr

Physics writing here includes research notes, seminar summaries, lecture notes, and bibliographic sketches.

Subculture writing includes criticism and essays on anime, games, music, idols, and livehouse culture.
